ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "version_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the model version (e.g., active, inactive, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "fp" INTEGER /* Number of false positives */,
  "fn" INTEGER /* Number of false negatives */,
  "tp" INTEGER /* Number of true positives */,
  "tn" INTEGER /* Number of true negatives */,
  "fpr" REAL /* False positive rate */,
  "fnr" REAL /* False negative rate */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the performance record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance record */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the performance record */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric used (e.g., AUC-ROC, F1-score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, model owner, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., sales, marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES model_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner assignment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the model */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_owners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_owners_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployment" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model is deployed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the model was deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., active, inactive, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployment_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_logs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., database, API, file) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_data_sources" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_usage" TEXT /* Description of how the data is used by the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_data_sources_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_data_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES model_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_notes_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
